page.title: Roles
page.subtitle: Admin-only permission templates, assignment rules, and Role-owned user assignments.
page.placeholder: Role identity/access implementation is not available.

templates.previewEmpty: Choose a template to preview generated permissions.
templates.generatedPermissionsHelp: Template permissions are generated as explicit role permissions.
templates.scopePlanHelp: Preview only. Assignment scopes are chosen when assigning a role to a user.
templates.backendAuthority: Backend validates authorization; frontend preview is not a security guarantee.
templates.permissionsRemainExplicit: Permissions remain explicit and template metadata is non-authoritative.

scopePicker.backendValidation: Assigning scopes affects runtime access. Backend rejects scopes the current actor cannot grant.

detail.boundaryNotice: Role grants permissions only. Role assignment and revocation remain Role-owned and do not mutate User profile, Auth0 linkage, lifecycle, Employment Profile, or business records.

update.title: Update metadata and delegation bands
update.subtitle: Only Role metadata and delegation-band fields are submitted.

permissions.title: Replace permissions
permissions.subtitle: Full replacement payload is exactly { permissions: [...] }.

assignmentRules.title: Replace assignment rules
assignmentRules.subtitle: Full replacement payload is exactly { rules: [...] }.

deactivate.title: Deactivate role
deactivate.subtitle: Active assignments or governance blockers may be rejected by the backend.

assignToUser.title: Assign role to user
assignToUser.subtitle: Creates a Role-owned assignment record only.

revokeAssignment.title: Revoke role assignment
revokeAssignment.subtitle: Assignment {{assignmentId}} will be updated as a Role-owned assignment record.

placeholders.userSearch: Search users by name or email

referenceHelp.userId: Choose the user account that receives this role assignment.

validation.invalidRulesJson: Assignment rules must be a JSON array with plain-object or null conditions.

confirm.activate: Activate this role if backend blockers allow it.
confirm.deactivate: Deactivate this role if there are no backend blockers.
confirm.archive: Archive this role if there are no backend blockers.

statesView.emptyMessage: Adjust filters or create a role.
statesView.loadErrorMessage: The role surface could not be loaded.

assignments.title: Role assignments
assignments.caption: Role assignments
assignments.emptyMessage: No Role-owned assignments match the current filter.
